results.title: 6 Best Wishlist Apps for Couples in 2026 (Tested and Compared) | Farha
results.content:
What sets Farha apart is its language support: English, French, and Arabic with full right-to-left layout. No other wishlist app in this comparison supports Arabic. For couples where one partner's first language is Arabic — common in France, Belgium, Canada, and across the MENA region — this removes a real friction point.

### Pros

 Add items from any online store, not just one retailer
 Secret reservations: reserved items are hidden from the wishlist owner
 Group gifting lets friends chip in on big-ticket items for your partner
 Shared links work in any browser, no account required for gift givers
 Supports English, French, and Arabic (only app with Arabic + RTL)
 Price drop alerts — know when a wishlist item goes on sale
 100% free, no premium tier

### Cons [...] ### Cons

 Newer app with a growing community
 No Safari browser extension yet (coming soon)

### Pricing

Free for all features. No paywalls on sharing, reservations, or group gifting.

Read more: How group gifting works

## 2. CoupleWish, best purpose-built for couples

CoupleWish is a new app built specifically around the couples gifting problem. It launched in beta in 2025 with a core feature called the "secret reservation" — when one partner marks something as a planned gift, the item is hidden from the other partner's view. The concept is solid and directly addresses the surprise-preservation problem. [...] ### Cons

 Designed primarily for organized exchanges, not everyday couple gifting
 No specific features for the couple use case
 All participants must have an Elfster account
 Limited universal adding

### Pricing

Free for basic exchanges. Premium tiers for advanced features and larger groups.

Read more: Full Secret Santa setup guide

## 5. Giftful, best for European multilingual couples

Giftful expanded to six new languages in October 2025 — Italian, French, Spanish, German, Portuguese, and Dutch — bringing its total to nine languages and 3 million users. It also added dynamic price tracking in the same update. For European couples who switch between French, Spanish, and English, Giftful covers that ground well.

results.title: Farha vs Giftster: Which Wishlist App Is Better for Families? | Farha
results.content:
### Farha's price tracking

Farha monitors the prices of items on your wishlist and notifies you when a price drops. This is useful during sales events like Black Friday, end-of-season clearances, or random flash sales. You add an item in October, and if it drops 20% in November, you get a notification. Simple.

This feature works automatically for any item added via URL. There's nothing extra to configure. The app checks prices periodically and alerts you when something changes.

### Giftster's stance

Giftster does not offer price tracking. Items on your Giftster list are static. If a price changes, you'd need to manually update the entry or check the retailer's site yourself. For families who plan gifts well in advance, this means potentially missing deals. [...] You should use Farha if:

 You shop across many online stores. Auto-fetching product details from any URL saves time and keeps everything in one place.
 Your family is international or multilingual. English, French, and Arabic support with worldwide store compatibility is a concrete advantage.
 Group gifting matters to you. Built-in contribution tracking for expensive items is useful for families splitting costs.
 You want price tracking. Automatic notifications when wishlist items drop in price help you save money.
 You want a modern interface. If design and usability matter to your family, especially for younger members, Farha's interface feels current.
 You need flexibility. Shared lists work for family, friends, coworkers, or anyone. You're not locked into one group model. [...] Choose Giftster if your family is US-based, already using the platform, and values a dedicated family circle with event calendars and member profiles. Giftster does this well and has for years. Its 2 million-plus user base is proof that the model works.

Choose Farha if your family shops across many stores, spans multiple countries or languages, or wants modern features like price tracking and group gifting. Farha's universal approach means you're not limited to one retailer or one country.

Both apps are free. You lose nothing by trying each one and seeing which fits your family's actual habits. The best wishlist app is the one your family will actually use consistently.

## Frequently asked questions

I hate the "goals not giving energy" anymore and, like you said, it feels more like a "keep your streak going" kind of app. [...] complain about but i really , really liked all the little stuff . i feel like finch is slowly becoming just another “keep your streak going!” app , which really breaks my heart . has anyone else been feeling really disappointed with how things seem to be going ? sorry if this post seems like it was written by someone who was half asleep i just feel very detached today 😭

results.title: FAQ Pages | Farha App
results.content:
What should I do in a mental health emergency?

Farha is not a medical professional. If you are in crisis or believe you might harm yourself or others, contact your local emergency services or a trusted healthcare provider immediately.

In which languages is Farha available?

Farha understands multiple languages, but because she was built in the Middle East she performs best in Arabic and English.

Where can I use the app?

You can download Farha from the Apple App Store and Google Play. For the best experience keep notifications enabled and run the latest version of the app.

What happens if I violate the terms of use?

If you violate the terms of use we may suspend or terminate your account and remove access to your data and any benefits, free or paid. [...] How is my personal information protected?

Your information is encrypted and stored on trusted cloud servers. We follow industry‑standard practices to protect, monitor, and manage your data.

Can I request to delete my data or profile?

Yes. In line with Apple, Google, and GDPR guidelines you can delete your profile and data at any time. Note: once deleted, your information cannot be recovered.

Who can I contact about privacy concerns?

Email our team at XX@farhaapp.com and we’ll be happy to help.

Is Farha free to use?

Yes. Farha is free to download and use. Certain optional features—like premium Transformation packages or extended AI chat sessions—may require a one‑time purchase. We will never contact you by phone or link to request payment outside the app. [...] Is Farha a real person?

Farha is not a real person; she is a custom‑built AI agent. She is not a medical professional, and her guidance is based solely on publicly available research and insights.

Can I talk to Farha about anything?

Yes. Farha is here for you to discuss openly and privately any topics you might find difficult to share in the real world.

Is Farha a licensed therapist or doctor?

No. Farha is not a licensed therapist or doctor; her guidance is based solely on publicly available research and insights.

What are the limitations of AI guidance?

Farha’s guidance is only as accurate as the information you share. She cannot diagnose medical conditions and should not replace professional help in emergencies.

What should I do in a mental health emergency?
